name: marinotta-skills
description: A Claude Code plugin marketplace for reusable development, review, translation, and utility skills.

plugins.name: exchange-rate
plugins.description: Currency conversion, latest rates, historical rates, and exchange-rate trends.

plugins.name: git-auto-workspace
plugins.description: Resolve GitHub remotes into ~/Code/Github.com/<owner>/<repo> and create or clone the workspace before running git commands.

plugins.name: prd-solution-review
plugins.description: Analyze a repo plus requirements and draft a concise review-ready solution proposal.

plugins.name: medium-track
plugins.description: Fetch Medium articles via your own sid cookie, translate to Simplified Chinese, and produce a structured key-point summary inline.

plugins.name: translate-en-zh
plugins.description: Translate English pages, PDFs, Markdown, HTML, and text into Simplified Chinese.
